description_long: This rifle features a distinctive skeletonized wooden thumbhole stock, providing both structural support and ergonomic grip. The main receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from matte black metal, with the barrel extending forward in a straight, cylindrical form. The trigger and magazine area are integrated into the central body, with the magazine not visibly protruding. The rifle's design is utilitarian, with minimal external attachments or embellishments, and the sighting system appears to be a simple iron sight. The muzzle is unadorned, lacking any visible suppressor or flash hider. The overall appearance suggests a blend of modern and classic firearm elements, suitable for practical use in urban environments.
description: A rifle with a skeletonized wooden thumbhole stock and a matte black metal barrel and receiver, featuring simple iron sights and a utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the skeletonized wooden stock and the straight black barrel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular muzzle and the narrow profile of the barrel, with the wooden stock barely visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, again emphasizing the wooden stock and the metal receiver.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the wooden stock and the back of the receiver, with the barrel extending away.
